# Iron Club

## Description

- Every 4 cards you play, draw 1 card.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Strong in decks with free cards, Bloodletting turns, and repeated low-cost card plays; it rewards natural multi-card sequencing without changing the deck.
- Counter persists across turns in combat; do not burn critical exhaust cards solely to force a draw unless that draw is needed immediately.
- If the counter is 3, playing Headbutt can place a card on top and then immediately draw it from Iron Club's 4th-card trigger.
